calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: INV-074 crystallization necessity (post-Phase-3-enrichment retest; supersedes 610c)
items.note: INV-074 crystallization-necessity retest after substrate implementation IGW-20260601-023 (test_bed_enrichment_crystallization_necessity). V3-EXQ-610c FAILed with D2=False: control arm did NOT show predicted collapse (d2_delta -0.0057; needed >= +0.10). Diagnosis: CausalGridWorldV2 supplied no post-Phase-3 destabilizing pressure (env/test-bed ceiling). Substrate fix (2026-06-01T17:42:58Z): infant_curriculum Phase 3 now enables destabilizing dynamics (SD-047 multi_source_dynamics + SD-048 interoceptive_noise + accelerated env_drift). Prediction: control arm (ARM_0 crystallize=False) will NOW show entropy collapse under Phase-3 pressure (D2 delta >= +0.10); crystallized arm (ARM_1 crystallize=True) will preserve Phase-2 diversity (D1 delta >= +0.10). 2-arm discriminative (control vs test), 3 seeds (42/43/44), 2500 episodes through all 4 phases. Claims: INV-074 (primary), MECH-333, MECH-334. PASS = D1 AND D2 AND D3 -> INV-074/MECH-333/MECH-334 all support. D2 FAIL again -> escalate to /diagnose-errors (substrate still insufficient). validate_experiments AST OK (already in ree-v3/experiments/); smoke test PASS (dry-run 5 eps both arms, no crash). Phase3-queue snapshot race mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md (post-commit dropped-file check).
